name: Sincere Watch (Hong Kong) Limited
summary: Sincere Watch (Hong Kong) Limited, an investment holding company, distributes branded luxury watches, timepieces, and accessories in Hong Kong, Macau, Mainland China, and internationally. It operates in two segments, Watch Distribution and Property Investment. The company primarily provides Franck Muller watches and accessories. It offers its products under the CVSTOS, Pierre Kunz, European Company Watch, and Backes & Strauss brands. The company also engages in the property investment activities. It operates a distribution network of 51 retail points of sales and 10 boutiques. The company was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
